full_text:
Gao Rou (Wenhui) 高柔 (文惠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Rou (高柔), styledWenhui (文惠), was born in Chenliu. Minister of the Interior. Given provisional command of the army to seize Cao Shuang’s camp. Gao Rou was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom. Gao Rou lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
